examples: He took out a sheaf of papers and leafed through them.
All the trees are leafed out now.
I leafed through it out of a sense of obligation.
At his bungalow in Marrakech, Cox interspersed a thicket of spiky bamboo with a big curvy-leafed fig tree.
Startle.com leafed through the top fall foliage destinations to come up with 10 that we think are worth a look.
